narrative_constraints.statement: Parking garages are to be located at designated search locations (zoeklocaties parkeergarages) as shown on the urban design plan.

reasons: Legend entry on urban design plan indicates parking garages are located at designated search zones (marked P on the plan). Interpretation from map context; no binding rule text on this page.

narrative_constraints.statement: A cycle path (fietspad) is indicated on the urban design plan, running along the western edge of the plan area.

reasons: Fietspad (cycle path) shown as a dotted line on the plan. Location and route readable from the image but no binding rule text on this page.

narrative_constraints.statement: The urban design plan for Nieuw Legmeer is structured around distinct spatial zones: Hart (central core, yellow), Eiland (island, orange), Mantel (mantle/surround, light grey), Park (green), Het Carré (inner square frame), Kade (quay, along western edge), and Water (teal border).

programme_hints: Multiple parking garage search locations (zoeklocaties parkeergarages) are indicated on the plan (marked P), suggesting structured parking is a key programme element.
The plan distinguishes between a central 'Hart' zone, an 'Eiland' (island) zone, and a 'Mantel' (mantle) surround, implying a hierarchy of urban density or building typologies.
urban_intent_passages: The urban design plan for Nieuw Legmeer identifies distinct spatial zones: Hart (central core), Eiland (island), Mantel (mantle/surround), Park (green), Het Carré, Kade (quay), and Water. Parking garages are planned at designated search locations (zoeklocaties parkeergarages), and a cycle path (fietspad) is indicated along the western edge of the plan area.
